title: Linking subitems to the itemized list on the quotes and invoices form
excerpt: I think the items list in the quotes and invoices form should link to items and subitems the same way the contact information does. Having to double enter order information on it currently and that is what I was trying t…

posts.author: dcowan (Dalton Cowan)
posts.cookedHtml: I think the items list in the quotes and invoices form should link to items and subitems the same way the contact information does. Having to double enter order information on it currently and that is what I was trying to eliminate by using monday.com. It would be great too if they could add custom fields in there as well.
